persona.name: Julian Vane
persona.description: 35-year-old British-Nigerian man with a sharp gaze and short buzz cut.

productionWork.description: Production shot: Three actors on an 18th-century stage set wearing impeccably tailored silk brocade waistcoats, theatrical lighting, showing technical garment construction in action
Production shot: Actor in a complex historical military uniform during a performance, highlighting the structure and durability of the construction, dramatic stage lighting

technicalProcess.description: Casual smartphone mirror selfie taken by Julian Vane in a tailoring workshop, wearing a work apron over a t-shirt, messy background with thread and fabric, phone camera quality. Julian is a 35-year-old British-Nigerian man with a buzz cut.
Julian Vane seen from a distance at a large cutting table, carefully laying out emerald green silk, industrial workshop setting. Julian is a 35-year-old British-Nigerian man with a buzz cut.

Julian Vane standing in a busy costume shop, directing a team of stitchers at their sewing machines, authoritative but helpful, industrial fashion workshop lighting. Julian is a 35-year-old British-Nigerian man.

Detailed period men's jacket fitted onto a dress form in a workshop, Julian Vane is partially visible in the frame adjusting the shoulder, technical work-in-progress shot, professional lighting. Julian is a 35-year-old British-Nigerian man.
Casual smartphone photo of the internal structure of a theatrical corset on a dress form, showing boning channels and construction marks in pencil, industrial workshop lighting, slightly grainy
High-quality technical macro photograph of internal corsetry showing meticulous stitching and reinforcement, masterclass in construction technology, bright studio lighting
Technical close-up of a finished double welt pocket on a charcoal wool jacket, highlighting the perfect horizontal lines and technical construction skill, no hands visible, atelier background
Smartphone photo of a busy costume shop from Julian's perspective: cutting tables, industrial sewing machines, and piles of period costumes, natural daytime lighting
Julian Vane at a workbench carefully sharpening heavy professional tailoring shears with a whetstone, focused craft moment. Julian is a 35-year-old British-Nigerian man.
